sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112484" key="fugo/patris" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῠγό-πατρις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n112484.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fugitive from one's country,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.198</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
